name: Scrum
description: This template is for teams who follow the Scrum framework.

name: Agile
description: This template is flexible and will work great for most teams using Agile planning methods, including those practicing Scrum.

name: CMMI
description: This template is for more formal projects requiring a framework for process improvement and an auditable record of decisions.

name: Basic
description: This template is flexible for any process and great for teams getting started with Azure DevOps.

name: Scrum for Safeguard
description: Safeguard Customisations to the default Scrum process - WIP

name: Scrum for Privileged Manager for Windows
description: Process with customizations required for Privileged Manager for Windows

name: Scrum for Log Management
description: Process with the customization required for Log Management

name: Scrum for Technical Integration
description: Scrum for Technical Integration Project

name: OID Agile Process - Prod
description: This Agile process defines One Identity’s standard Azure DevOps framework for the single-project model, supporting consistent delivery, clear reporting, and team autonomy while allowing targeted, lightweight adjustments to meet evolving needs. It is inherited from ADO's default Agile template. This is the prod version of the process.

name: Scrum with Initiatives
description: Scrum process with additional level above the Epics - Initiatives. It also contains customization required by Tech Comm to work with List of Known Issues and List of Updates

name: Scrum for Technical Communications
description: Process template for TechComm Guild

name: Scrum for DBO
description: Process with the customization required for DBO

name: Scrum for Authentication Services
description: Authentication Services -  Customisations to the default Scrum process - WIP

name: Scrum for SPS
description: Process with the customization required for SPS project

name: Agile for TFS
description: Baseline Agile Process Template for TFS migrations

name: Scrum for Privileged Manager
description: Privileged Manager Customisations to the default Scrum process - WIP

name: OID Agile Process - original
description: This Agile process defines One Identity’s standard Azure DevOps framework for the single-project model, supporting consistent delivery, clear reporting, and team autonomy while allowing targeted, lightweight adjustments to meet evolving needs. It is inherited from ADO's default Agile template. This is what has been created by the project do not use it just left for reference.

name: POC - OID Agile Process - Prod - Feature Epic
description: This Agile process is based on the OID Agile Process - Prod, OID's standard Azure DevOps baseline. It is specifically created to conduct a POC for adjusting ADO to adjust ADO's default Epic/Feature/User Story work item hierarchy to align with a Feature/Epic/User Story hierarchy while maintain out-of-the box ADO functionality.

name: OID Agile Process - Sandbox - Prod with Initiatives
description: This process template demonstrates how to incorporate an "Initiative" work item type into the OID ADO standard work management. This process template was specifically designed to explore how best to model NetCom Readiness, a major cross-product, customer-facing delivery program within ADO.

name: Scrum for OIM
description: Process for One Identity Manager

name: Scrum for ARS
description: Scrum process with additional level above the Epics - Initiatives. It also contains customization required by Tech Comm to work with List of Known Issues and List of Updates - it is customized for Active Roles project.

name: Scrum for Global Enablement
description: Scrum for Global Enablement project.

name: OID Agile Process - Sandbox
description: A sanbox for the OID Agile Process - Prod definition. This Agile process defines One Identity’s standard Azure DevOps framework for the single-project model, supporting consistent delivery, clear reporting, and team autonomy while allowing targeted, lightweight adjustments to meet evolving needs. It is inherited from ADO's default Agile template. This is the prod version of the process.
